creator: fbsd-bugzilla@schlachter.ca
text:
Wow, that fixed it! Thanks for the quick reply. Is this something that's likely to need an update to the samba416 package, or is it more likely something local to my environment? If it's the latter, thanks again and let's close this ticket.

$ ldconfig -r | grep -i samba

$ doas ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib/samba4

$ ldconfig -r | grep -i samba
        search directories: /lib:/usr/lib:/usr/lib/compat:/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg:/usr/local/lib/samba4
        549:-lndr-standard.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libndr-standard.so.0
        550:-lsamba-passdb.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-passdb.so.0
        551:-lndr-nbt.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libndr-nbt.so.0
        552:-lsamba-credentials.1 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-credentials.so.1
        553:-lsamdb.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamdb.so.0
        554:-ldcerpc.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libdcerpc.so.0
        555:-ldcerpc-samr.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libdcerpc-samr.so.0
        556:-lsmbclient.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsmbclient.so.0
        557:-lsamba-util.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-util.so.0
        558:-lsmbldap.2 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsmbldap.so.2
        559:-ldcerpc-server.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libdcerpc-server.so.0
        560:-lnetapi.1 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libnetapi.so.1
        561:-lsamba-policy.cpython-39.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-policy.cpython-39.so.0
        562:-lsmbconf.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsmbconf.so.0
        563:-lwbclient.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libwbclient.so.0
        564:-lndr.2 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libndr.so.2
        565:-ldcerpc-server-core.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libdcerpc-server-core.so.0
        566:-ltevent-util.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libtevent-util.so.0
        567:-ldcerpc-binding.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libdcerpc-binding.so.0
        568:-lndr-krb5pac.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libndr-krb5pac.so.0

        570:-lsamba-hostconfig.0 => /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-hostconfig.so.0

$ doas service samba_server start
Performing sanity check on Samba configuration: OK
Starting nmbd.
Starting smbd.
